name: Fresh Green Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cilantro and chili in the container of an electric blender.
2. Add 3 tbsp water to the blender.
3. Blend until you have a smooth paste.
4. In a non-metallic bowl, combine the yogurt, salt, pepper, cumin, lemon juice, and paste from the blender.
5. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
6. To serve: Bring the cooled mixture to the table. People should take just a tablespoon at a time.
